item.name: Papalymo & Yda Card
item.description:
A rare (★★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 48

en.description:
“The great beyond! I do believe we're dead, Papalymo!”
“Oh, Rhalgr take you and your great beyond!”

ja.description:
「遅いぞ、イダ！」
「えへへ、よかった無事で」
暁の血盟：パパリモ／イダ

de.description:
„Na <Emphasis>endlich</Emphasis>, Yda!“
„Ah, so ein Glück! Ihr seid alle unverletzt!“

fr.description:
“Je suis Papalymo, et le moulin à paroles, c'est...”
“Moi, c'est Yda<Indent/>! Enchantée<Indent/>!”
